notes: Regular SEDs typically do not respond to ping probes in OTNS.
Parent attachment is inferred from the OT CLI parent command and child state.
MLE and IP counters are collected, but packet loss alone is not treated as disconnection.
Delayed node activation applied: router_b after 360 simulated seconds.
Live OTNS scan compatibility is inconsistent in this setup; scan-derived RSSI/LQI fields are left empty.
